source_semantics.rgb: RGB branch score (cross-conditioned by current depth teacher features)
source_semantics.depth: Depth branch score (cross-conditioned by current RGB teacher features)
source_semantics.fusion: Fusion score from current rgb_cross + depth_cross anomaly maps
source_semantics.rgb_isolated: RGB branch score with depth assist replaced by a fixed training-domain reference
source_semantics.depth_isolated: Depth branch score with RGB assist replaced by a fixed training-domain reference
